name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Write Protect For Storage Disabled
notes:
This Building Block detects changes to registry to disable any write-protect property for storage devices.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Sreeman
SIGMA Title: Write Protect For Storage Disabled
SIGMA Description: Looks for changes to registry to disable any write-protect property for storage devices. This could be a precursor to a ransomware attack and has been an observed technique used by cypherpunk group.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Write Protect For Storage Disabled on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reg add%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\system\currentcontrolset\control%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%write protection%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%0%' AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%storage%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%storagedevicepolicies%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Write Protect For Storage Disabled on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reg add%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\system\currentcontrolset\control%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%write protection%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%0%' AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%storage%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%storagedevicepolicies%') AQL filter query
